summary: Complete Dark/Light Mode Theme Toggle Testing - All 8 features tested and verified. Theme toggle button visible in sidebar, switching works correctly, localStorage persistence confirmed, page refresh maintains theme, correct dark aqua blue colors applied.
passed_tests: Theme toggle button visible in sidebar user section with data-testid='theme-toggle-btn'
Clicking theme toggle switches from light to dark mode correctly
Clicking theme toggle switches from dark to light mode correctly
Dark mode persists after page refresh via localStorage
Button text shows 'Dark Mode' in light theme
Button text shows 'Light Mode' in dark theme
Dark mode body/main background color: rgb(13, 23, 28) - matches HSL(200, 35%, 8%)
Dark mode card background color: rgb(21, 34, 40) - matches HSL(200, 30%, 12%)
Light mode background color: rgb(248, 251, 251) - light aqua tint
Light mode card background color: rgb(255, 255, 255) - white
Login page respects dark theme stored in localStorage
Login page respects light theme stored in localStorage
Sidebar maintains consistent dark aqua blue styling in both modes
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext properly initializes theme from localStorage with fallback to system preference
CSS variables correctly defined in :root and :root.dark selectors
index.html contains script to prevent flash of wrong theme before React loads
Theme transition animation (0.2s) provides smooth visual switching
Sidebar always uses dark aqua blue (hsl(200,35%,12%)) regardless of theme - good UX decision
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark/Light mode theme toggle is fully functional. Theme is stored in localStorage and persists across page refreshes. CSS variables in index.css handle both light (:root) and dark (:root.dark) themes. The sidebar maintains its dark aqua blue appearance in both modes. Login page also respects the stored theme setting.
